discussion_comments.comment_body: instead of declaring a env var TAG_NAME in each step, maybe just use needs.extract-release-info.outputs.tag_name or have a step to add it for the entire job as env var

discussion_comments.comment_body: Cursor complains about using `needs.extract-release-info.outputs.tag_name` directly as inputs to bash scripts, possible shell injection. Since each job gets its own environment, it is not possible to set `TAG_NAME` globally.
